issues.description: Missing Blocker keyword effect. Card text states '[Blocker]' which should be represented as a separate effect with GiveKeyword action or as a static ability. The DSL only includes the [On Play] effect.
Target scope incomplete. 'maxCost:1' is correct but should include 'maxCount':1 to represent 'up to 1' limitation explicitly, or the action should clarify it selects at most 1 character.
